name: release-approval-verifier
description: Independent multi-role release verifier with MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, signed receipts, and unattended scheduling.

interface.shortDescription: Independent verifier with four equivalent runtime surfaces
interface.longDescription: Freeze release roles from Feishu, validate authenticated replies, send bounded reminders, seal aggregate receipts, and hand off PRE_RELEASE_REQUESTED through MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, or unattended OS scheduling.
defaultPrompt: Validate the production verifier configuration and frozen role source.
Inspect a role snapshot digest and enabled required roles.
Review why a reply was quarantined instead of affecting verifier state.
